description: Resalat (رسالت, 'Mission') was founded in 1985 as the organ of traditional conservative Islamic politics, closely tied to the Tehran Bazaar and the Islamic Coalition Party (Hezb-e Mo'talefeh). Alongside [Kayhan](/orgs/kayhan-newspaper), it is one of the two leading hardline-conservative dailies but is editorially independent of direct Supreme Leader control.
